# Project status

_Updated 2026-06-23 · phase: exploration_

## Where things stand

- People: 2 founders in Cologne, Germany, part-time.
- Land: comparing (Germany, Portugal); target 1-4 ha; not secured.
- Entity: none.
- Funding: not started. Raised €0. Pipeline €0.
- On land: no.

Approach: Crowdfunding and friends & family first; small grants in parallel; major grants once an entity and site exist.

## Milestones

- 2026-06 — Refactored the documentation into a forkable model and our case; built the first engines.

## Next
